actionCalls.description: Send alert "New Meeting Assigned - notify owner"
actionCalls.name: OC_New_Meeting_Assigned_notify_owner
actionCalls.label: OC - New Meeting Assigned - notify owner

actionCalls.description: Send alert - "Meeting Pending or Rescheduling - 2 days/week overdue"
actionCalls.name: PPPD_Meeting_Pending_or_Rescheduling_2_days_week_overdue
actionCalls.label: PPPD - Meeting Pending or Rescheduling - 2 days/week overdue

decisions.name: Need_to_update_Sub_Division_from_User
decisions.label: Need to update Sub Division from User?

rules.name: Yes_Need_to_update_Sub_Division
rules.label: Yes, Need to update Sub Division

decisions.name: Need_to_update_YoY_Sub_Division
decisions.label: Need to update YoY Sub Division?

rules.name: Yes_Need_to_update_YoY_Sub_Division
rules.label: Yes, Need to update YoY Sub Division

decisions.name: OC_which_profile_it_was_changed_to
decisions.label: OC - which profile it was changed to

rules.name: Relevant_Sales_Profiles
rules.conditionLogic: 1 AND 2 AND 3 AND (4 OR 5 OR 6 ) AND (7 OR 8 OR 9)
rules.label: Relevant Sales Profiles

decisions.description: If 'Owner' is changed - execute 'Owner is changed' outcome
decisions.name: Rule
decisions.label: *Rule (OC)* - Owner is changed?

decisions.description: If 'Country' is changed or 'State Name' is changed and Account is not blank and Country is not blank - execute 'Country || State changed' outcome
decisions.name: Rule_CSC_Country_State_changed
decisions.label: *Rule (CSC)* - Country || State changed?

decisions.description: If record is new or 'Status' is changed and Account is not blank and 'SYSHasRelatedOpp' = False and 'Record Type' = AE or Chat or Inside_Sales or MIR_Handover or SDR or SDR_for_Upsell or SMB_AM - execute 'Completed & (SDR / Chat/ IS/ AE)' outcome
decisions.name: Rule_CSCIA_Completed_SDR_Chat_IS_AE
decisions.label: *Rule (CSCIA)* - Completed & (SDR / Chat/ IS/ AE)

rules.name: Completed_SDR_Chat_IS_AE
rules.conditionLogic: (1 OR (2 AND 15) OR (14 AND 15)) AND 3 AND 4 AND (5 OR 6 OR 7 OR 8 OR 9 OR 10 OR 11 OR 13) AND 12
rules.label: Completed & (SDR / Chat/ IS/ AE)

decisions.description: If 'Status' is changed and 'Status' = Completed and 'Record Type' = Chat or SDR or Inside_Sales - execute 'Look for Opportuinity' outcome
decisions.name: Rule_LFO_Look_for_Opportuinity
decisions.label: *Rule (LFO)* - Look for Opportuinity

decisions.description: When Meeting RT = SDR or MIR and Status is changed to 'Cancelled' or 'Unqualified' -> 'SDR/MIR meeting is closed' outcome will be executed
decisions.name: Rule_MC
decisions.label: *Rule - (MC)* - SDR/MIR meeting is closed

decisions.description: If the record is new or 'Status' is changed and 'Status' = Completed - execute 'Meeting is Completed' outcome
decisions.name: Rule_MC_Meeting_is_Completed
decisions.label: *Rule (MC)* - Meeting is Completed

decisions.description: If record is new Owner user role is not blank and record type is 'MIR' and 'Created By Name' not contains 'Integration' and 'Created By Profile' is not Administrator - execute 'MIR Created' outcome
decisions.name: Rule_MC_MIR_Created
decisions.label: *Rule (MC)* - MIR Created

rules.name: MIR_Created
rules.conditionLogic: 1 AND 2 AND 3 AND 4 AND NOT (5 AND 6 AND 7)
rules.label: MIR Created

decisions.description: If record type SDR or MIR and status = Completed - execute 'SDR/MIR meeting is completed' outcome
decisions.name: Rule_MIS_SDR_MIR_meeting_is_completed
decisions.label: *Rule (MIS)* - SDR/MIR meeting is completed

decisions.description: If record is new - execute 'Meeting is new (Create BI Data)' outcome
decisions.name: Rule_NM_New_Meeting
decisions.label: *Rule (NM)* - New Meeting

decisions.description: If 'Contact Related to' is not blank and the record is new or 'Contact Related to' is changed - execute 'New Meeting Related to Contact' outcome
decisions.name: Rule_NWRC_New_Meeting_Related_to_Contact
decisions.label: *Rule (NWRC)* - New Meeting Related to Contact

decisions.description: If the record is new and 'Date' is less than today and 'Status' = Pending or Rescheduling - execute 'Pending/Rescheduling - Past date' outcome
decisions.name: Rule_PPPD_Pending_Rescheduling_Past_date
decisions.label: *Rule (PPPD)* - Pending/Rescheduling - Past date

decisions.description: MIS-5672 - If Related Opportunity field is updated, update the field Related Meeting in the relevant Opportunity
decisions.name: Rule_ROU_Related_Opportunity_Updated
decisions.label: *Rule (ROU)* - Related Opportunity Updated

decisions.description: If 'SW Industry' is changed and SW Industry is not blank and Account is not blank - execute 'SW Industry changed' outcome
decisions.name: Rule_SWIC_SW_Industry_changed
decisions.label: *Rule (SWIC)* - SW Industry changed?

decisions.description: If 'Status' = Completed and Record Type = Chat or SDR or Inside_Sales or MIR_Handover or Inside_Sales and Account is not blank and 'SYSHasRelatedOpp' = False and 'SW Industry' is blank - execute 'SW Industry Fill' outcome
decisions.name: Rule_SWIF_SW_Industry_Fill
decisions.label: *Rule (SWIF)* - SW Industry Fill

rules.name: SW_Industry_Fill
rules.conditionLogic: 1 AND (2 OR 3 OR 6 OR 7 OR 8) AND 4 AND 5 AND 9
rules.label: SW Industry Fill

Flow.description: MIS-8311 - Added Meeting Sub Division and YoY Sub Division update MIS-8302 - Added BLBA Meeting Score copy on creation MIS-7609 remove porduct sold MIS-6753 - Sending next steps to Opp creation flow MIS-6407 - Multithread Meeting check MIS-5672 - Update Related Opportunity with Relevant Related Meeting MIS-5382 - Update NT MEeting moved to Before Save Flow MIS-5335 MIS-5104 MIS-4608 Last - MIS-4072 update NT meeting MIS-2958 different alert to SMs

formulas.description: Returns how many days passed since the most recent completed meeting
formulas.name: FR_Multithread_Meeting_Days

formulas.description: Returns True IF Meeting RecordType and Related Meeting RecordType are relevant to Multithread
formulas.name: FR_Multithread_Meeting_RecordType
formulas.expression: AND( OR( {!$Record.RecordTypeId} = '012b0000000g3CYAAY', /* SDR Meeting */ {!$Record.RecordTypeId} = '012b0000000cffrAAA', /* Sales Meeting */ {!$Record.RecordTypeId} = '0120O0000007rdUQAQ' /* MIR Handover */ ), OR( {!Get_Related_Meeting.RecordTypeId} = '012b0000000g3CYAAY', /* SDR Meeting */ {!Get_Related_Meeting.RecordTypeId} = '012b0000000cffrAAA', /* Sales Meeting */ {!Get_Related_Meeting.RecordTypeId} = '0120O0000007rdUQAQ' /* MIR Handover */ ) )

Flow.label: Meeting - Record Triggered Flow - After Save

recordUpdates.description: Update Account State/Country on related record
recordUpdates.name: CSC_Update_Account_State_Country
recordUpdates.label: CSC - Update Account State/Country

recordUpdates.name: NWRC_Update_First_Meeting_on_Contact
recordUpdates.label: NWRC - Update First Meeting on Contact

recordUpdates.description: Update 'Most Recent Meeting' on related Contact
recordUpdates.name: NWRC_Update_Most_Recent_Meeting_on_Contact
recordUpdates.label: NWRC - Update Most Recent Meeting on Contact

recordUpdates.name: NWRL_Update_First_Meeting_on_Lead
recordUpdates.label: NWRL - Update First Meeting on Lead

recordUpdates.name: Set_YoY_Sub_Division_Meeting_Sub_Division
recordUpdates.label: Set YoY Sub Division = Meeting Sub Division

subflows.description: Run flow "Create Opp Upon SDR Meeting Completion"
subflows.name: CSCIA_Create_Opp_Upon_SDR_Meeting_Completion
subflows.label: CSCIA - Create Opp Upon SDR Meeting Completion
